MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Sunhill Corporation is present. Represented by Eric Ching.
Attorney William Steven Weisberg appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Richard Davis is present.
Attorney Louise Christine Siojo representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jim Watson, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of JAN-23-2012 is vacated.
